tool_args.raw_text: MTA Board Action Items, May 2021, MTA Board Meeting at 2 Broadway, 20th Floor Board Room, New York, NY 10004, Wednesday, 5/26/2021

payload.title: MTA Board Action Items
payload.description: MTA Board meeting agenda, minutes from April 21, 2021 meeting, and procurement actions for May 26, 2021 meeting. Includes committee reports, presentations on Penn Station Master Plan, Central Business District Tolling Program, and various procurement actions across MTA agencies.

issues: evidence_refs must include at least one source block
warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.
